chunks.title: 20sec
chunks.text: The stale smell of old beer lingers.

chunks.title: 20sec
chunks.text: It takes heat to bring out the odor.

chunks.title: 20sec
chunks.text: A cold dip restores health and zest.

chunks.title: 20sec
chunks.text: A salt pickle tastes fine with ham.

chunks.title: 20sec
chunks.text: Tacos al pastor are my favorite.

chunks.title: 20sec
chunks.text: A zestful food is the hot cross bun.

text: The stale smell of old beer lingers. It takes heat to bring out the odor. A cold dip restores health and zest. A salt pickle tastes fine with ham. Tacos al pastor are my favorite. A zestful food is the hot cross bun.
